priorities.check_method: Full deep-read audit (Fable 5 Ultracode), research-only, NO production code changed. Deep-read the entire core sim: physics/ (verlet, bonds, collision, spatial, physicsLoop), state/ (world dispatch seam, save/netSnapshot, scoring complexity-income, territory engulf-sag, gameMode, placePrimitive, sparkLifecycle, benchGate, disruptionManager, rainbow derangement, stateHash, rng), net/ (protocol v14, sync HostSync/ClientSync render-delay buffer, hostHandlers/clientHandlers trust chain, successionWarrant D1), combos.ts (36-entry table, 14 magic order-symmetric), main.ts tick loop. Smell sweeps (TODO/ts-ignore/skip/console/Math.random/Date.now/setInterval), ts-prune dead-export pass, npm outdated. 3-way Council (Grok-4.20-reasoning ANALYST + Gemini-2.5-pro AUDITOR — FIRST full 3-way since S111) on 8 ranked findings + PRIME-AUDIT of every Council-surfaced risk against code. Deliverable AUDIT_S116.md: 11 findings ranked severity×effort. TOP-3 (both models converged): F1 per-tick redundant complexity/component recompute on host (High/Small — no memoization, ~12+ graph walks/tick at 6P; Grok called it understated), F7 host-migration+worker-sim half-built (High/Large — host death kills match), F8 geometric-builder core under-delivered (High/Med — 14/36 placeholders, 9/14 magic combos visuals-only; reframed from arch-bug to product-debt per Grok). PRIME-AUDIT REFUTED: sim RNG nondeterminism (only Math.random is render-only sudoku fireworks; hazards use seeded mulberry32), full-vs-incremental snapshot divergence (NetSnapshot IS full-every-10Hz), golden-replay-in-CI (save.replay.test.ts 24 tests in suite). CONFIRMED gaps: F9 no INTENT rate-limit, F10 Pixi-leak UNVERIFIED (logged not dropped). Recommended queue: Tier-A A1 F1-memoization + A2 consistency/hygiene batch (F3/F4/F5/F6) THIS session-class (safe/high-value); Tier-B strategic fork (B1 hostmig-D2 [parked PDR] vs B2 worker-sim vs B3 one symbiotic combo) as owner pick. gates untouched (research: tsc 0, vitest 1779/1779 baseline held).
